tagline: Rewrite the greatest regular season ever.
summary: Full-league historical universe with real season stats, real-season boot, and Draft The Era support.
whyItMatters: This is the first proof that RosterBate can turn a real historic season into both a truthful archive run and an alternate-history fantasy sandbox.

tagline: Bird, Magic, and a young Jordan in one league.
summary: A future full-season universe centered on the peak of the Celtics-Lakers era and the rise of Jordan.
whyItMatters: This is the cleanest bridge between the Showtime-Lakers era, peak Celtics rivalry, and the earliest true Jordan sandbox.

tagline: Shaq and Kobe, AI's run, Duncan in his prime.
summary: A modern-classic historical universe with dominant bigs, elite guards, and a very different draft board from the 1990s packs.
whyItMatters: This era creates a very different fantasy board from the 1990s packs, with elite bigs, heliocentric guards, and a more modern roster mix.

tagline: Seventy-three wins, unanimous MVP, and the 3-1 Finals swing.
summary: A future pace-and-space universe built around the Warriors, Cavs, and one of the most recognizable modern NBA seasons.
whyItMatters: This season gives the archive lane a modern tentpole pack that new players instantly recognize, with a very different strategic texture from older eras.
